howItWorks.intro: This postpartum recovery calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: 4-6 weeks for vaginal delivery, 6-8 weeks for C-section, with full recovery taking longer.

faq.q: When can I exercise after birth?
faq.a: Light walking immediately, but wait 6-8 weeks (vaginal) or 8-10 weeks (C-section) for more.

howWeCalculate.intro: This postpartum recovery calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
